title: platanthera glossophora
intro: Platanthera glossophora, commonly known as the green adder's mouth orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the genus Platanthera. This plant is known for its medicinal properties and has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. The health benefits of Platanthera glossophora include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as wounds, infections, and respiratory issues.
